kind_source: monitoring/daily_schedule.py slot (7, 23) -> ("PILOT_SAMPLE", "QQQ"). The expectation file logs/scheduler/expected/pilot-20260721-0723.expected.json carries no kind field, so the schedule table was consulted rather than inferring the kind from the run-id prefix.

preflight.unfinished_trajectories_note: logs/quote_trajectories/2026-07-21/ does not exist; no prior trajectory files were open for 2026-07-21. Step 1 vacuously satisfied. Run pilot-20260721-0703 earlier today also wrote zero events.

upstream_gate.market_gate_detail: 4 PASS / 1 FAIL (immutable raw MCP snapshot) / 1 UNKNOWN (deterministic replay equality)
upstream_gate.effect_on_this_run: Formal Shadow remains unauthorized. This PILOT_SAMPLE run is research-only and excluded from performance, so it proceeded; no Shadow evidence was produced.

market_data.bar_timestamp_alignment: All 10 symbols returned 88 bars with identical newest begins_at; no gaps, duplicates, or out-of-order bars detected.
market_data.lookback_exemption_note: The 420-second limit was applied only to the newest completed bar (14:15:00Z). Older lookback bars were used at their recorded timestamps without a freshness rule, and no ten-second rule was applied to them.

evaluation.computation_note: Indicators were computed by a deterministic local script over the immutable MCP historicals payload. The script performs no network access. No value was estimated or hand-derived.
evaluation.ema_seeding: 20-bar simple average seed, then standard 2/(n+1) smoothing

QQQ.why: The 14:15:00Z bar closed above session VWAP but the immediately preceding completed bar did not, so QQQ failed the pinned confirmation_completed_bars = 2 requirement.

market_regime.reason: require_price_vs_vwap_alignment = true with confirmation_completed_bars = 2 demands that BOTH reference symbols hold alignment across the last two completed bars. SPY qualified; QQQ did not. Per mixed_or_unknown_means_no_trade = true, a mixed reference set resolves to NO_TRADE.

evaluation.volume_gate_note: No symbol reached even the strategy_v1.0.toml floor of 1.50; the highest observed ratio was TSLA at 1.24. The BASE_25 and BASE_30 label thresholds are strictly higher still.

BASE_25.reason: VOLUME_CONFIRMATION_FAILED for all 10 symbols (max ratio 1.24 vs required 2.5); upstream MARKET_REGIME_NOT_DIRECTIONAL.

BASE_30.reason: VOLUME_CONFIRMATION_FAILED for all 10 symbols (max ratio 1.24 vs required 3.0); upstream MARKET_REGIME_NOT_DIRECTIONAL.

AI_RANK_V1.reason: Zero deterministically qualified candidates. AI may rank or abstain only; with an empty qualified set the only permitted action is ABSTAIN. AI did not override, relax, or reorder any deterministic gate.

candidates.note: TSLA satisfied breakout, EMA alignment, and VWAP alignment on its own bars. It failed only the volume gate and the upstream market-regime gate. This is the closest observation of the day so far and is recorded as research only.

NEAR_MISS.reason: Two highest volume ratios recorded as near-miss research observations. Neither reached contract selection: the market-regime gate is upstream and returned NO_TRADE, so no direction is deterministically defined and no contract could be chosen without inventing one.

policy_trade.note: Run pilot-20260721-0703 also produced NO_TRADE and consumed zero candidates, so the one-per-day policy-trade budget remains unused and available to later slots.

option_quote_refresh.reason: No contract was selected under any label, so there was no instrument to refresh. Zero option MCP calls were made.

simulated_fills.reason: No candidate reached contract selection; no fill, spread, latency, or friction figures are applicable. No mark fill was assumed anywhere.

trajectories.reason: config/quote_trajectory.schema.json requires instrument_id, option_type, strike and expiration_date on every event. With no selected contract these fields have no observed values, and inventing them would fabricate data. Zero events were written rather than partial or synthetic ones.

mcp_tool_usage.attestation: Only enabled official read-only get_* tools were used. No review, place, replace, cancel, transfer, watchlist-mutation, or account-mutation tool was invoked. No account numbers, names, credentials, tokens, or personal data were read or stored; no account, portfolio, positions, or orders endpoint was touched by this run.

caveats: FREEZE CEREMONY INCOMPLETE: TODO.md:191 ('Freeze BASE_25, BASE_30, and AI_RANK_V1 before the next market sample') is still unchecked. Label semantics were taken from research/ACCELERATED_PROFITABILITY_AND_AI_EDGE_V1_CN.md (volume ratio >= 2.5 / >= 3.0) with all other parameters from strategy/strategy_v1.0.toml. These results are provisional until an owner performs the formal freeze; they must not be treated as frozen-label evidence.
strategy/strategy_v1.0.toml carries status = 'DESIGN', not an approved/frozen status.

VWAP is not supplied by the official MCP bar feed and is not pinned in strategy_v1.0.toml. Session VWAP was derived as volume-weighted typical price ((H+L+C)/3) over completed 2026-07-21 regular-hours bars, carried forward unchanged from pilot-20260721-0703 for consistency. This unpinned derivation feeds the regime gate and directly caused today's NOT_DIRECTIONAL verdict via QQQ; it should be pinned before any formal use.

The 20-bar volume average is a rolling window that crosses the session boundary: for the 14:15Z bar it spans today's bars plus a portion of yesterday's final bars. Mixing high-volume opening and closing bars into the denominator materially depresses mid-morning volume ratios. This follows the pinned volume_average_lookback_bars = 20 definition and was NOT altered, but the session-boundary behaviour deserves owner review and may explain why no symbol has approached 2.5 today.
EMA-20 seeds from a 20-bar simple average with 88 bars of history; warmup is adequate but the slow EMA remains approximate near the seed.

The upstream MARKET_GATE for today failed closed on the immutable raw MCP snapshot, so no run today has a verified immutable snapshot backing it. This PILOT_SAMPLE run therefore has no immutable-snapshot provenance for its inputs.

The scheduled expectation file carries no run-kind field; the kind was resolved from monitoring/daily_schedule.py. If that table and the scheduler ever disagree, this run's classification should be re-audited.
